author: lOrm
content: Landed config plumbing in src/config/bash.rs: BashConfig { sandbox: BashSandboxMode (None/Firejail/SandboxExec), excluded_commands: Vec<String> }. BashSandboxMode::detect_available() probes which to verify wrapper presence; wrap_unimplemented() returns Err for every non-None variant so attempts to use a sandbox before the launcher lands fail fast. BashConfig::is_command_excluded checks first-token basename match against excluded_commands (CC settings.sandbox.excludedCommands parity). Added bash: BashConfig field on AppConfig. 5 tests pin: default is None / detect_available / wrap_unimplemented errors / binary names / excluded_commands matching / YAML deserialization across all three variants. Phase 2 (actual sandbox launch) deferred.
